comments.text:
Lowered this bug into a contract-first selective-receive outcome-closure arc:
- fz-go4.10.3 Define selective-receive outcome-closure contract in docs and tests
- fz-go4.10.1 Generalize compiler2 native delivery contracts beyond callable-entry adapters
- fz-go4.10.2 Route compiler2 native return/resume/tailcall through one delivery planner
- fz-go4.10.4 Remove selective-receive debugging debt and re-enable deferred coverage

Execution rule: prove the hit-path contract first, then centralize delivery planning, then consume it in terminators, then remove scaffolding.

title: Fix compiler2 native selective receive over make_ref identities
